title: Boulder Co Vlog 4/7/18: Roller Rode 3 hrs, 44.69Mi

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs from Boulder, Colorado after a 3-hour, 44.69-mile roller ride on April 7, 2018. He discusses knee pain that forced him to back off intensity, exercise-induced asthma disrupting his sleep, and his plan to swap tomorrow's bike session for running and swimming. He's also looking forward to his first real swim workout using underwater earphones.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: ride at 100W and ~85 RPM, not 65 RPM or 150-200W, to protect knees
believes fatigue triggers immune overdrive that causes airway inflammation and breathing difficulty
will skip biking and do running and swimming to let knees recover
was nervous before but now excited; plans to use underwater earphones
